german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Mostly Non-Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant majority of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility but with a notable share of unclassified positions.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Customer-Facing Roles Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core PMs and Customer-Facing PMs, indicating a concentration in product management roles.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: More than half of the positions are filled by senior-level professionals.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates with Limited Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of roles require on-site presence, with minimal remote or hybrid options available.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: All job opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with no remote or unclear options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise Remains Emerging in Workforce Roles
ai.subtitle: Only 25% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities or require AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Notable Diversity and Balance
industry.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating potential accessibility constraints.
